task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with the required columns and combinations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing a file with headers 'color', 'pos', and 'corrAns', containing 4 rows of data representing the combinations of Red/Green colors and Left/Right positions (e.g., [-0.5, 0] and [0.5, 0]).

task_completion.description: Create an 'instructions' routine with welcome text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface showing a routine named 'instructions' (or similar) in the flow, containing a Text component with welcome instructions.

task_completion.description: Create a trial routine with a Circle stimulus linked to the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing a Polygon/Circle component properties window. The 'color' and 'position' fields should be set to variables from the conditions file (e.g., $color, $pos) and set to 'set every repeat'.

task_completion.description: Add a Keyboard response component mapping 'left' and 'right' keys and storing correct answers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing a Keyboard component properties window with 'Allowed keys' containing 'left' and 'right', and the 'Store correct' box checked with the correct answer field set to a variable (e.g., $corrAns).

task_completion.description: Insert a loop around the trial routine that loads the conditions CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder flow showing a loop around the trial routine. The loop properties window must show 'simon_conditions.csv' loaded in the Conditions field, recognizing the parameters and 4 conditions.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window title or a save dialog showing the file saved as 'simon_task.psyexp' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively interacting with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, configuring components) rather than writing a .psyexp XML/JSON file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or properly generated the conditions CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a spreadsheet editor (like LibreOffice Calc) or a text editor open with the CSV contents being typed or formatted, rather than magically appearing without interaction.

integrity.description: The agent built the experiment from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step construction of the experiment in the PsychoPy Builder interface over multiple screenshots, proving the agent did not simply download or copy a completed 'simon_task.psyexp' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_task.psyexp'. The conditions file must be saved at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_conditions.csv'. The conditions file must contain exactly the columns 'color', 'pos', and 'corrAns', and have at least 4 rows representing the 4 combinations of Red/Green and Left/Right.
